title: besleria delphinioides
intro: Besleria delphinioides, also known as dolphin's mouth, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a type of epiphyte native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, and is prized for its unique, dolphin-shaped flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Besleria delphinioides can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall health.
